title: Loupe Trace
description: The Loupe wire format v1. A single trace document for POST /api/traces, equivalent to a closed JSONL file flattened into one object. See docs/SPEC.md for the full contract.

trace_id.description: Unique id for this run. If omitted, the server generates one. 32-hex UUID4 recommended.

name.description: Human-readable label of the agent run.

framework.description: Short id of the framework / sdk / wrapper that produced this trace.

started_at.description: Unix seconds (float) when the run began. Defaults to server time.

ended_at.description: Unix seconds (float) when the run finished. Null means still open.

step_id.description: Unique id within the trace. Auto-generated if absent.

kind.description: Type of step. The dashboard color-codes these.

inputs.description: Free-form input payload. Common keys: messages, prompt, model, max_tokens, temperature, stream.

outputs.description: Free-form output payload. Common keys: text, input_tokens, output_tokens, stop_reason, finish_reason, streamed.

error.description: If set, this step is rendered as red and is taggable.
